Title: PARALLEL WITH
Description: Allows to execute multiple statements in parallel.
Executes statementsstatement1,statement2,statement3, ... in parallel with each other. The output of those statements is discarded.

Executing statements in parallel may be faster than just a sequence of the same statements in many cases. For example,statement1 PARALLEL WITH statement2 PARALLEL WITH statement3is likely to be faster thanstatement1; statement2; statement3.
Settingmax_threadscontrols how many threads are spawned.
